title: At the Grand Merillian
overview: Constance Grail attends a party only to find her fiancé kissing another woman and herself accused of a crime.

title: An Extraordinary Villainess and an Ordinary Girl
overview: The ghostly Scarlett demands that Constance repay her help by avenging her death.

title: Respective Answers and Beginnings
overview: Constance and Scarlett follow a tip to a masked ball with a sinister reputation.

title: The Silent Ladies' Tea Party
overview: Constance receives a summons from an investigative committee determined to put her on trial.

title: And the Cock Crows to Herald the Dawn
overview: Constance's carriage suffers a shocking attack and an even more shocking rescue.

title: The Command of the Goddess
overview: Both Constance and Randolph uncover fresh clues, but Lily's last message remains shrouded in mystery.

title: A Banquet of Insectivorous Plants
overview: Daeg Gallus contrives to murder Aisha before she can reveal the truth and cast suspicion on Abigail.

title: Lily Orlamunde
overview: Constance, Scarlett, and Randolph discover a letter that reveals Lily's struggle and the truth she uncovered.

title: The Holy Grail of Eris
overview: Scarlett possesses Constance to confront her own father.

title: For the Future
overview: Constance, Scarlett, and Randolph pursue the kidnapped Ulysses and stumble into a shootout.

title: Those Who Defy Fate
overview: Constance is jailed on her own testimony and given a sentence of death.

title: The Final Chapter: At the Grand Merillian
overview: As the hour of Constance's execution approaches, Scarlett finds a crucial document and Cecilia makes her move.
